basics.name: Alexander Widing
basics.label: Lead Architect / Head of Engineering
basics.summary: Full-stack architect and engineering leader with over 11 years of experience owning end-to-end system architecture, from technology selection and design to production deployment. Currently focused on production AI engineering alongside SaaS architecture. Experience spanning enterprise platforms, multi-tenant systems, and leading cross-functional teams. I build systems and teams, from ERP suites and AI powered products to coaching athletes to national records.

work.name: DxT Corporation Co., Ltd.
work.description: SaaS startup developing Translation Management System
work.summary: Leading technical vision and system architecture for enterprise-grade SaaS Translation Management System (TMS). Hands-on architect role combining system design with AI engineering implementation.
highlights: Designed end-to-end system architecture including technology stack selection, data models, API design, and functional workflows
Set organization-wide technical direction and architecture standards as strategic partner to CEO
Built production RAG pipeline integrating vector search with LLM generation for AI-powered workflows
Implemented evaluation frameworks to score and measure LLM output quality, with human evaluation loops
Engineered prompt versioning system and hallucination mitigation strategies for reliable LLM outputs
Define technology stack, coding standards, and CI/CD pipelines for scalable multi-tenant SaaS architecture
Own full product lifecycle from requirements to production monitoring, hands-on with code daily
Lead cross-functional team of 5 spanning engineering, product, QA, and project management

work.name: EQHO Communications Ltd.
work.summary: Led development team at digital agency, delivering custom systems and websites for clients across diverse industries.
highlights: Architected and delivered web solutions and custom e-commerce platforms for clients, integrating third-party APIs and payment systems
Designed and deployed infrastructure architecture for regional airline websites serving China and Taiwan markets
Built and documented full REST API with OpenAPI/Swagger specification for airline client
Led technical direction for small engineering team while remaining hands-on with code
Managed DevOps responsibilities including server or compute provisioning, deployment automation, and production monitoring

work.name: EQHO Globalization Pte. Ltd.
work.position: Corporate Systems Manager / Senior Software Engineer
work.summary: Designed and developed suite of internal corporate systems and client-facing applications.
highlights: Designed and developed suite of internal corporate systems including ERP, CRM, Accounting, Project Management, and HRM modules — adopted company-wide, reducing operational overhead by 90% for executive, sales, and project management teams
Gained hands-on corporate finance and accounting knowledge through mentorship while building an accounting system, learning financial workflows, reporting, and compliance requirements
Migrated legacy systems to modern frameworks, reducing maintenance overhead and improving performance
Managed production databases with business-critical data, implementing backup and recovery procedures

work.name: Com7 AB

highlights: Managed IT infrastructure at the Bangkok office
Performed on-site network installations at B2B customer offices in Gothenburg
Built a client database and automation tool using PHP, Python, and MySQL to aggregate subscription data from service providers and generate reports for the sales team
Provided technical support for corporate customers (phone switches, network, WiFi) and assisted with home cell antenna installations in remote areas

projects.name: MMO Networking Proof-of-Concept
projects.description: Multiplayer 2D roguelike game built to stress-test networking architecture for MMO-scale applications
highlights: Stress-testing single-server player capacity and multi-region scaling architecture
Designed custom networking layer with delta compression and WebSocket real-time state sync
Built authoritative game server handling physics, combat validation, and AI
Developed Go REST API with JWT authentication, PostgreSQL persistence, and Redis caching
Orchestrated multi-container deployment with Docker Compose

projects.name: TMS SaaS Platform
projects.description: Translation Management System with AI-powered features for the enterprise localization market
highlights: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture serving enterprise clients
Production RAG pipeline, Vector retrieval, context injection, LLM generation for automated translation
Implemented prompt versioning with multi-shot prompting and training for hallucination mitigation
Built evaluation pipeline using evaluation frameworks, and human evaluation for output quality measurement
Vector store with semantic search for translation memory retrieval
Dual embedding strategy: OpenAI for cloud processing, and HuggingFace sentence transformer for offline processing
Python automation scripts for AI integrations and workflow automation

Designed REST API with full OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for technical team
Managed infrastructure for regional sites
Queue-based job processing for content updates

projects.name: GPS Tracker System
projects.description: Arduino-based GPS tracking device with web interface for vehicle/boat tracking and anti-theft purposes (Thesis Project)
